title: Find It Fast
narrative: The crates are sorted but face-down — you can't see the numbers! Probe one crate at a time to find the target. Each probe tells you 'higher' or 'lower'. How few probes can you use?

levels.name: Higher or Lower
levels.hint: Click a crate to flip it. It tells you if the target is higher or lower. Try the middle!

levels.name: Twenty Questions
levels.hint: 16 crates, hidden numbers. Always pick the middle of what's left — you'll need at most 4 guesses!

levels.name: Double the Haystack
levels.hint: 32 crates but the par only goes up by one! Doubling the crates costs just one extra guess.

levels.name: Unsorted Nightmare
levels.hint: These crates are NOT sorted. No binary search possible — you have to check one by one. Feel the pain!
